description: Generate and review coding-agent plans as structured visual documents with diagrams, wireframes, prototypes, annotations, share links, feedback, and HTML export.

auth.setup: Install with the Agent-Native CLI to add the /visual-plan and /visual-recap skills plus the Plan MCP connector. Plans use the app session for scoped storage and review; Google sign-in is available when OAuth env vars are configured.

surfaces.description: Create or open an Agent-Native visual plan for a coding-agent task.
Create a visual recap plan from a PR, commit, branch, or git diff for high-altitude review.
Open a local, repo-backed visual documentation workspace for APIs, components, models, flows, comments, and coding-agent handoff.
